titleStmt.title: SII 20.21: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 21. (B.K. No. 58 of 1937-38.) RŪGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone standing near the front wall of the Hanumān temple (back and left sides).

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 941, Siddhārthin, Paushya, ba. 10, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti corresponding regularly to December 24, A.D. 1019.

It records that while the king was ruling from Ētagiri, and his son Mahāsāmanta Dāsarasa was governing the eighteen agrahāras including Rūvige, situated in Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu, Mahāsāmanta Dhanasaṅgrahayyarasa of the Seḷaṟa family made a gift of land to God Nagarēśvara of Āneya-Rūvige, for worship and offerings as also for the maintenance of the ascetics of the place. The gift was entrusted to Bāḷachandrapaṇḍita.
The king is stated to have been ruling from his capital (nelevīḍu) Ētagiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaThere are traces
śrīpṛthvīvallabhamahā
rājādhirājaparamēśvarapa
ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ gaṇḍaroḷgaṇḍaṁ gaṇḍa
baṁgāṟaṁ tējamārttaṇḍaṁ mā
rppaḍe bhīmaṁ mallikāmō
daṁ kīrttividyādharaṁ kōda
ṇḍacaturbhbhujaṁ rājēndra
cōḻamadabhaṁjanaṁ bhō
jakuḷakāḷānaḷaṁ gūrjja
ravajrapāta māḷava
nirmmūḷanaṁ jagadēkamallaṁ
śrīmajjayasiṁghadēvar
sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁdācandrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ catussāgarapa
ryyantaṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttu
mire . Ētagiriya nelevī
ḍinoḷ . vṛtta . kaliballāḷana
sanda siṁhana bhujāvaṣṭaṁbhamaṁ
kaṇḍu saṁcaḷacittaṁ draviḷakṣa
māparivṛḍaṁ bennittanuddā
mabhūvaḷeyaṁ bīyene
pātitadvipapatākaṁ kāṁdi
śīkaṁ bhayākuḷitānīka
napāstavikramaguṇōdrē
kaṁ bhayabhrāntiyiṁ .
baḷavadvidviṣṭabhūbhṛttati
ge javanedarppaṭṭu kayyānta
dīnāvaḷigiṁdrōrvvījananyāṁgane
ge pavanaja cāru cāḷukya
vaṁsōtpha ḷaṣaṇḍakkindubiṁba
tuhinakara surēbhēndranī
hāratārācaḷatārānīka

ṇa ma viśada
yaṁ gaṇḍabandikāṟadēvane .
śrīmacṭāḷukyavaṁsa śikhā
maṇi rājādhirājanūrjjita
tējaṁ bhīmabhujaṁ jayalakṣmīdhāmaṁ ja
yasiṁghadēvanadaṭara dēva .
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
sāmantaṁ suvarṇṇagaruḍadhvajaṁ subhaṭaśiraśśē
kharaṁ samaraikavīraṁ vīracūḍāmaṇi yēkavā
kyaṁ gaṇḍaratīrtthaṁ kaṭakasannāhaṁ siṁghana garuḍaṁ
śrīmaja gadēkamalladēvara magaṁ śrīmaddā
sarasar . tarddavāḍināḍo(ḷa)gaṇagrahā
raṁ rūvige modalāgi padineṁṭagrahārama
nāḷa ta ṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdarasugeyyu
ttamire . sakavarṣa 941 neya siddhārttha saṁvatsaRead 'rtthi'
rada puṣyabahuḷada dasami bṛhaspativāraṁ Utta
rāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyandu śrī ballavarasargge bi
nnapaṁgeydu Āneya rūvigeya nagarēśvara
dēvara bhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphu ṭitakkamallirppa tapō
dhanara pathyāhāramōṣadha nimityakamāgi
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇaja
pasamādhisampannarappa śrīmat bāḷacandra
paṇḍitargge Alliya baḍagavolada manneya
sāmyada mānyavoladoḷage Aḷaṁpūra baṭṭe
yiṁ paḍuva kiṟiyiṇḍiya baṭṭeyiṁ piriyi
ṇḍiya sīmeyaṁ mūḍalanteraḍuṁ baṭṭeyiṁdo
ḷage śrīmaddasavarmmadēvara kālada teṟeya
ḷateya piriya kōloḷ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
māḍi biṭṭa nelaṁ mattaru 150 kke nibandhada
ruvaṇaṁ gadyāṇa 1 svasti samadhigata
pancamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ kopaṇapura
varēśvaraṁ seḷaṟamārttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidante gaṇḍaṁ muḷiva
rādityaṁ manneya vallabhaṁ gaṇḍarācāryyaṁ nāmā
di samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmaddhanasaṁgraha
yyarasarssukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdarasuge
yyuttumā nelana dēvargge dhāreyeṟedu koṭṭu tamma
dharmmaṁ māḍi pratipāḷisidar . gūḷigana māṁThis anusuvāra is unnecessary.
rganasagana bēḷādude sāladaṇṇa dhanasaṁgrahanoḷkā
ḷegamanoḍari pandaṁ kōḷeḻdahipatige meyya
noḍḍuvaranda . kontaṁ kuḷi koragana mukhāntaṁ varavajraghā
tamahitakritāntaṁ santaṁ bāḷmasagadiridāṁkaṁ ma
nneya kirīṭatāṭitacaraṇaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
